title: Chicken Chili
description: From Barefoot Contessa Parties! — the star of Ina's Football Party menu. A hearty white chicken chili with cannellini beans, poblano peppers, and a generous amount of cumin and chili powder. It's lighter than beef chili but just as satisfying, and it feeds a crowd beautifully. Make it a day ahead — it only gets better.

ingredients.item: Red bell peppers, seeded and diced
Boneless, skinless chicken breasts, cut into 1-inch cubes
Cannellini beans, drained and rinsed (2 15-oz cans)

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot or Dutch oven over medium heat. Add the onions and cook for 10 minutes, until translucent. Add the garlic and cook for 1 more minute.
Add the poblano and red bell peppers and cook for 5 minutes. Add the chili powder, cumin, oregano, and cayenne and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken pieces and cook, stirring, for 5 minutes, until the chicken is lightly browned on the outside.
Add the chicken stock and bring to a boil. Reduce the heat and simmer for 20 minutes. Add the beans, corn, salt, and pepper and simmer for 10 more minutes.
Taste and adjust seasonings. Serve hot with sour cream, cheddar cheese, and scallions on the side.
tips: This chili is even better the next day — make it ahead and reheat gently.
Poblano peppers add a mild, earthy heat — if you can't find them, use a second red bell pepper plus a jalapeño.
For a thicker chili, mash some of the beans against the side of the pot before adding them.
Serve with Ina's Sour Cream Cornbread for the full Football Party experience.
Source: Barefoot Contessa Parties! by Ina Garten (2001)
